---
title: "Jacob Jameson"
image: ../images/profile.png
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 13em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: rss
      text: blog
      href: https://jacobjameson.com/posts/blog
    - icon: envelope
      text: email
      href: mailto:jacobjameson@g.harvard.edu
    - icon: github
      text: github
      href: https://github.com/jacobjameson
    - icon: twitter
      text: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/JacobCJameson
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: cv
      href: /Data/Jameson_vitae.pdf
    - icon: book
      text: scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=jIrUgQsAAAAJ&hl=en
    - icon: film
      text: letterboxd
      href: https://letterboxd.com/jacobjameson/
from: markdown+emoji
comments: false
page-layout: full
---
<style>
/* Job market bar — injected above the trestles content, full width */
.jm-bar {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.72rem;
letter-spacing: 0.07em;
background: #f0fdf4;
border: 1px solid #bbf7d0;
border-left: 3px solid #16a34a;
border-radius: 2px;
padding: 10px 16px;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 10px;
margin-bottom: 1.75rem;
color: #166534;
}
.jm-dot {
width: 7px;
height: 7px;
border-radius: 50%;
background: #16a34a;
animation: jm-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
flex-shrink: 0;
}
@keyframes jm-pulse {
0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
50% { opacity: 0.3; }
}
.jm-bar a {
color: #15803d;
font-weight: 500;
text-decoration: underline;
text-decoration-color: #86efac;
text-underline-offset: 2px;
}
.jm-bar a:hover { color: #166534; text-decoration-color: #16a34a; }
</style>


<div class="prompt-line"><span class="ps1">jacobjameson</span>@<span class="host">harvard</span>:~$<span class="cursor"></span></div>
 
## whoami

<div class="hero-subtitle">phd candidate &nbsp;·&nbsp; health policy &amp; decision sciences &nbsp;·&nbsp; harvard university</div>

<div class="jm-bar">
<span class="jm-dot"></span>
I am on the academic job market for 2026--2027. Please feel free to <a href="mailto:jacobjameson@g.harvard.edu">get in touch</a> or view my <a href="/Data/Jameson_vitae.pdf">CV</a>.
</div>


[My research](research.qmd) develops and applies methods in causal inference, decision modeling, and reinforcement learning to support better decision-making in health and public policy. I study the impacts of physician behavior, health policies, and personalized medicine. Thematically, I am interested in the areas of mental health and emergency medicine.

I am an NIMH T32 Predoctoral Research Fellow in Comparative Effectiveness Research for Suicide Prevention at [Brigham and Women's Hospital](https://www.brighamandwomens.org) and Research Statistician with The U.S. Department of Veteran Affairs. I also care deeply about [teaching](teaching.qmd)---I have been very fortunate to work with many students at Harvard, The University of Chicago, and New Haven Public Schools during my time as a Teach For America corps member.
 
## cat news.log
<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2026-05</div>
<div class="news-text"><span class="news-flag">new</span>Awarded the <a href="https://www.hks.harvard.edu/more/about/leadership-administration/academic-deans-office/slate/research-and-innovation/making/teaching#recipients">Dean's Award for Excellence in Student Teaching</a> by the Harvard Kennedy School.</div>
</div>


<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2026-05</div>
<div class="news-text"><span class="news-flag">new</span>Presented at the <a href="https://pomsmeetings.org/conf-2026/">36th Annual POMS Conference</a>.</div>
</div>

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2026-05</div>
<div class="news-text"><span class="news-flag">new</span>Posted a preprint of new paper: <a href="https://www.medrxiv.org/content/10.64898/2026.05.06.26352568v1">The Effect of Legalizing Online Sports Gambling on Population Mental Health</a>.</div>
</div>

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2026-03</div>
<div class="news-text">Selected (29/132) for the <a href="https://sites.google.com/umich.edu/isye-mse-ioe-joint-rising-star/home">2026 IOE-ISyE-MS&E Rising Stars Workshop</a>. People's Choice Award for poster presentation🏅</div>
</div>

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2026-03</div>
<div class="news-text">Finalist in Harvard's <a href="https://gsas.harvard.edu/academics/writing/three-minute-thesis">Three Minute Thesis (3MT®) Competition</a>.</div>
</div>

---

<details>
<summary>show earlier entries</summary>

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2025-09</div>
<div class="news-text">Finalist, <a href="https://connect.informs.org/discussion/finalists-of-the-2025-informs-has-best-student-paper-competition">INFORMS HAS Best Student Paper Competition</a> — <a href="/Data/INFORMS Award 2025.pdf">Honorable Mention</a>.</div>
</div>

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2025-06</div>
<div class="news-text"><a href="/Data/Distinction Award 2025.pdf">Awarded the Distinction in Student Teaching</a>, Harvard Kennedy School.</div>
</div>

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2024-05</div>
<div class="news-text"><a href="/Data/Distinction Award 2024.pdf">Awarded the Distinction in Student Teaching</a> and the <a href="https://www.hks.harvard.edu/more/about/leadership-administration/academic-deans-office/slate/research-and-innovation/making/teaching#recipients">Dean's Award for Excellence in Student Teaching</a>, Harvard Kennedy School. <a href="https://chds.hsph.harvard.edu/jameson-wins-student-teaching-award/">↗</a></div>
</div>

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2024-05</div>
<div class="news-text">Awarded NIMH T32 Predoctoral Fellowship in <a href="https://causalab.sph.harvard.edu/suicideprevention/">Comparative Effectiveness Research for Suicide Risk Prevention</a>.</div>
</div>

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2024-02</div>
<div class="news-text"><a href="https://chds.hsph.harvard.edu/chds-welcomes-new-educational-innovation-scholar/">Selected to be the Center for Health Decision Science Educational Innovation Scholar</a>.</div>
</div>

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2024-02</div>
<div class="news-text"><a href="https://chds.hsph.harvard.edu/2024-raiffa-fund-awards/">Received the 2024 Howard Raiffa Award</a>, Harvard Center for Risk Analysis.</div>
</div>

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2023-09</div>
<div class="news-text">Finalist, <a href="https://connect.informs.org/discussion/psor-best-paper-and-best-video-competition-results">INFORMS Public Sector OR Best Video Award</a> — <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=do6j8G9qUoM">Improving Emergency Department Flow</a>.</div>
</div>

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2023-01</div>
<div class="news-text"><a href="https://chds.hsph.harvard.edu/jameson-receives-raiffa-award/">Received the 2023 Howard Raiffa Award</a>, Harvard Center for Risk Analysis.</div>
</div>

</details>
